title: Admiral Agent Definition Contract v1
description: Enforcement-layer contract for Admiral agent definitions. Captures tool capability grants and path scopes for runtime enforcement by tool_grant_enforcer. Companion to the Agent Spec Protocol (ASP) which captures identity, scope, boundaries, and authority. See aiStrat/admiral/spec/agent-spec-protocol/README.md.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier. Must match the agent filename without .md extension.

version.description: Semantic version of this contract. Increment on any change.

role.description: Functional role category. Controls which role-specific defaults apply.

asp_spec_ref.description: Path to the ASP document that defines this agent's full identity, scope, boundaries, and authority. Null until full ASP migration (F-15b). See aiStrat/admiral/spec/agent-spec-protocol/README.md.

model_tier.description: Model tier per ASP Part 4 Model Selection. tier1_flagship for orchestration/security/design, tier2_workhorse for implementation/QA, tier3_utility for triage/routing, tier4_economy for high-volume lightweight tasks.

tools.description: Explicit tool capability grants. Deny-by-default: if a tool is not in allowed, it is implicitly denied.

allowed.description: Explicit whitelist of tools this agent may invoke.

denied.description: Explicit deny list (documentation aid). Any tool not in allowed is already implicitly denied. Listing here makes intent explicit.

paths.description: Path scope. denied overrides write. Patterns are glob-style relative to project root.

read.description: Readable path patterns. Use ["**/*"] for full read access.

write.description: Writable path patterns. Empty array means no write access.

denied.description: Hard-denied path patterns. Takes precedence over write grants.

authority.description: Decision authority tier mapping. Every action category must belong to exactly one tier.

autonomous.description: Action categories the agent may execute without approval. Log the decision.

propose.description: Action categories requiring a written proposal before proceeding.

escalate.description: Action categories requiring immediate halt and escalation to Admiral.

standing_orders.description: Which Standing Orders apply to this agent. 'all' is standard; custom subsets only for specialized agents.
